A summary of every Caro Realm awakener. This is meant to be a description of what they generally do, how they play, what enlightens they require, and anything else a new player might want to know. This is the Third in a 4 part series that will provide the same overview for all realms.
https://youtu.be/Fi7HlqZlcZY

embeds.title: A Summary of Caro: A Simple Guide to Every Red Awaker

Enlightens, card effects, general play patterns, availability
